Upload this entire dist folder to your static host — keep index.html at the site root.

Chat embed widget

Use only this API: global ChatWidgetEmbed.init({ ... }) with apiBaseUrl (default public API: https://ai-assistance-service.onrender.com). Snippets below use this page’s origin for widget files and that API for chat. Your API must allow CORS from sites where you paste the embed. Snippets that say initChatWidget or localhost:3000 are wrong.

Static assets: prefer hashed URLs in production (immutable cache). Stable names exist for quick tests.

  • chat-widget.9d51947b9621.js (recommended)
  • chat-widget.5e4ab6d2fed2.css
  • chat-widget.js / chat-widget.css (no-store)
  • widget-loader.js — one tag for third-party sites (loads CSS + JS + init)

Smoke test: open demo-live.html or demo-loader.html — you should see the chat pill.

Third-party sites: one <script> (recommended)

Paste anywhere (end of <body> is ideal). This snippet uses this site’s origin for the loader, async, and omits data-api-base so chat uses the default API (https://ai-assistance-service.onrender.com). Add data-api-base="" only for same-origin APIs; set data-api-base="https://…" to override.


  

  
Copy-paste embed (manual: link + script + init)

  
Uses hashed asset URLs and apiBaseUrl: 'https://ai-assistance-service.onrender.com'.

  

  

  
The loader line supports async. The manual block below is optional (hashed assets + explicit init).
